decisionBoundary: This public-safe manifest separates proof buckets. It does not create buyer evidence, production deploy approval, Supabase advisor clearance, or launch-ready status.

items.label: Last approved production artifact
items.evidenceBoundary: Only proves the deployed artifact checked during the latest approved deploy; it does not prove production parity for future source commits, which require an approved deploy and another live parity run.
items.nextAction: Rerun after every approved production deploy before calling live parity current.

items.label: Current source release gate
items.command: pnpm run check:release-readiness && gh run list --repo sanjabh11/canada-energy-dashboard --limit 5
items.evidenceBoundary: Local and CI checks must be refreshed for the current SHA; a source check does not prove production deploy parity.
items.nextAction: Run source and CI checks before any approval packet or release request.

items.label: Source provenance and dirty-worktree gate
items.evidenceBoundary: Deploy requests require a clean main worktree; this public manifest does not prove current local cleanliness.
items.nextAction: Resolve, commit, or explicitly approve unrelated local changes before any production deploy request.

items.label: Buyer evidence 95% gate
items.evidenceBoundary: No buyer-proven market confidence without accepted buyer rows, reviewer evidence, commercial signal, and retained artifact hashes.
items.nextAction: Collect real anonymized buyer evidence and keep rehearsal rows at confidence_delta=0.

items.label: Supabase connector advisors
items.command: Supabase MCP security/performance advisors for qnymbecjgeaoxsfphrti
items.evidenceBoundary: CLI lint does not substitute for connector-backed advisors; current advisor evidence remains account-authorization dependent.
items.nextAction: Fix Supabase connector or project authorization, then rerun security and performance advisors.
